title: New New Year Image
wikitext:
[]: New ‘New Year’ Image             Quote Post by unitM » Fri Jan 26, 2018 6:56 pm It’s not a lot but I figured it should be reported. https://mobile.twitter.com/evangelion_c ... 4482108416 Khara tweeted a photo of a foggy Tokyo morning around New Years. The official Evangelion account then retweeted in something along with it. Bing translates it as “Today is not including those who were”, Google translate(IIRC) had it as “I wonder who’s already moving in 2018” or something. I don’t know if it’s something useful but it seems like an Eva photo retweeted by Khara and the official account.

[]: Re: New ‘New Year’ Image             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jan 28, 2018 3:21 pm It's essentially a standard new year's greeting about hard work in the past year/this year and to look forward to the Evangelion series this year. I'd assume it's implying we'll get Shin Eva news of some kind, then. (International (English) title + release dates depend just how far in production they are.)

Article: New New Year Image
[]: New ‘New Year’ Image             Quote Post by unitM » Fri Jan 26, 2018 6:56 pm It’s not a lot but I figured it should be reported. https://mobile.twitter.com/evangelion_c ... 4482108416 Khara tweeted a photo of a foggy Tokyo morning around New Years. The official Evangelion account then retweeted in something along with it. Bing translates it as “Today is not including those who were”, Google translate(IIRC) had it as “I wonder who’s already moving in 2018” or something. I don’t know if it’s something useful but it seems like an Eva photo retweeted by Khara and the official account.

[]: Re: New ‘New Year’ Image             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jan 28, 2018 3:21 pm It's essentially a standard new year's greeting about hard work in the past year/this year and to look forward to the Evangelion series this year. I'd assume it's implying we'll get Shin Eva news of some kind, then. (International (English) title + release dates depend just how far in production they are.)
